windows.transcript: 72 hours before burning. And that's it! You've got microwave made candles that are ready to share, gift, or sell. For more information on
windows.embed_text_v2: reveal three finished cured silver tin candles with set cream soy wax and centered wicks on white marble during 72 hour cure tip overlay from CandleScience tutorial
windows.summary_v2: Reveal of finished, cured tin candles with cure-time tip overlay (72 hours) and channel watermark from CandleScience.

seconds_v2.desc: Two finished silver-grey tin candles sit on a white marble counter; large white overlay text reads '...OR AT LEAST 72 HOURS' and a 'candlescience' watermark sits bottom right.
Same shot of the two closed silver tins with the '72 HOURS' overlay and watermark; cure-time tip displayed.
Overlay text fades off; two closed silver tins remain on white marble with just the 'candlescience' watermark visible.
Cut to three open tin candles arranged on the marble; pale cream solid wax with a centered wick visible in each, watermark still bottom right.
Same trio of finished tin candles with white wax fully set and centered wicks; watermark holds.
Slight camera shift over the three cured candles, all set white wax and trimmed wicks, on white marble.
Static beauty shot of the three finished tin candles on marble continues.
Same setup of three open silver tin candles fully cured.
Final hold on the three finished tin candles with cream wax and small white wicks ready to burn.
